programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: A man spends his whole life trying to keep his family together and facing many challenges to fulfill a promise he gave to his father when he was a child. Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif, Sunil Grover, Tabu , Jackie Shroff, Ali Abbas Zafar, Varun V. Sharma.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Finding Fanny
programme.desc: A man embarks on a road trip to find his lost love. Deepika Padukone, Arjun Kapoor, Naseeruddin Shah, Dimple Kapadia, Anjali Patil, Homi Adajania, Homi Adajania, Kersi Khambatta.

programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: A man spends his whole life trying to keep his family together and facing many challenges to fulfill a promise he gave to his father when he was a child. Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif, Sunil Grover, Tabu , Jackie Shroff, Ali Abbas Zafar, Varun V. Sharma.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: A man spends his whole life trying to keep his family together and facing many challenges to fulfill a promise he gave to his father when he was a child. Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif, Sunil Grover, Tabu , Jackie Shroff, Ali Abbas Zafar, Varun V. Sharma.

programme.title: Bombay Velvet
programme.desc: A street boxer decides to do his best to be a wealthy man in order to grab a jazz singer's attention. However, his ambition gets him involved in illegal activities. Ranbir Kapoor, Anushka Sharma, Karan Johar, Satyadeep Misra, Manish Chaudhari, Anurag Kashyap, Anurag Kashyap, Vasan Bala.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Patna Shuklla
programme.desc: A university student turns to a lower court lawyer to press charges against her university following an error in assessing her exam paper. What begins as a simple case turns out to be a major conspiracy led by a famous politician. Vivek Budakoti.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Bombay Velvet
programme.desc: A street boxer decides to do his best to be a wealthy man in order to grab a jazz singer's attention. However, his ambition gets him involved in illegal activities. Ranbir Kapoor, Anushka Sharma, Karan Johar, Satyadeep Misra, Manish Chaudhari, Anurag Kashyap, Anurag Kashyap, Vasan Bala.

programme.title: Patna Shuklla
programme.desc: A university student turns to a lower court lawyer to press charges against her university following an error in assessing her exam paper. What begins as a simple case turns out to be a major conspiracy led by a famous politician. Vivek Budakoti.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
programme.desc: Pooja's family decides to marry her off to Raj; however, Raj discovers that he has fallen for Pooja's best friend. Raj Kanwar, Rumi Jaffery, Preity Zinta, Rani Mukerji.

programme.title: Patna Shuklla
programme.desc: A university student turns to a lower court lawyer to press charges against her university following an error in assessing her exam paper. What begins as a simple case turns out to be a major conspiracy led by a famous politician. Vivek Budakoti.

programme.title: Namaste England
programme.desc: Consumed by the dream of immigrating to London, an Indian couple does whatever it takes to make it happen. Parineeti Chopra, Arjun Kapoor, Alankrita Sahai, Satish Kaushik, Atul Sharma, Vipul Amrutlal Shah, Suresh Nair, Ritesh Shah.
